channel.title: Global Dispatch: Shadow of Trust
channel.itunes:author: Eslam
channel.description: Investigative reports into the world's most dangerous secrets and global crises.

item.title: Heartbreak and Deceit: The Dark Side of Romance Scams #RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust #OnlineDating (Ep. v7)
item.description:
This podcast episode explores the dark side of romance scams and the betrayal of trust that can occur when people meet online. From the warning signs of a scam to the consequences of being scammed, we delve into the world of online dating and the dangers that lurk in the shadows.
🔍 Keywords: Romance Scams, Betrayal of Trust, Online Dating, Cybersecurity, Fraud
#RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust #OnlineDating #Cybersecurity #Fraud

item.title: Shadow of Trust: The Antarctica Betrayal
item.itunes:author: Eslam
item.description: Deep dive into the hidden truth behind the polar disaster.
